intro: During a journey across the desert in search of gold, a map is discovered. Thus, a secret that should never have been uncovered comes to light.
description:
● A Wild West journey with supernatural elements. Explore a variety of mystery-filled settings: abandoned towns, crumbling saloons, moving trains, the desert at night, and many other unknown environments.
● Platform-style shooting combat. Use your revolver to face human enemies and supernatural creatures. Dodge attacks and shoot with precision.
● A steadily growing atmosphere of suspense. The constant feeling of an unseen presence always lurking nearby.
● Story progression. In each area, new fragments of the narrative are revealed. From showdowns with outlaws to encounters with entities that vanish at dawn, the journey builds tension toward the final confrontation.
● Diverse settings and challenges. Engage in shootouts atop moving trains, survive a rainy night surrounded by monsters, and cross cursed lands.
